description_long: This kiosk features a tall, vertical frame constructed from slender metallic poles supporting a decorative wooden slat panel. The front panel is adorned with a circular emblem or logo, intricately integrated into the slatted design, giving it a modern and visually striking appearance. A sturdy, rectangular countertop projects from the front, likely made of stone or composite material, providing a functional surface for transactions or display. The structure is open on the sides and back, with no visible doors or windows, emphasizing accessibility and transparency. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms. The materials and construction suggest durability and suitability for urban environments such as sidewalks, plazas, or parks.
description: A tall, minimalist kiosk with a decorative wooden slat panel, circular emblem, and a projecting stone countertop, supported by slender metal poles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative wooden slat panel with a circular emblem and the full height of the supporting metal poles.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the panel and the depth of the projecting countertop, with open space behind.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wooden slat panel and the countertop extending forward, with the emblem visible through the slats.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the open structure and the relationship between the panel and the countertop.
attribute_signage_type: integrated logo, circular form, centrally placed within the wooden slat panel
attribute_roof_design: none; open-topped with vertical poles extending upward
